name: Integration - Observability Lifespan Initialization
description: Ensures that _obs_lifespan initializes observability, logs configuration summary, and connects to observability database.
input: Startup of FastAPI app with lifespan=_obs_lifespan; Config variables set.
output: Startup logs indicating successful initialization, database connection, and telemetry monitoring.
success_criteria: Telemetry monitoring is enabled or warning is logged
